news.title: Extreme debuts AI agent built to catch network issues before users feel them - Stock Titan
news.summary: Extreme Networks reported strong Q3 2026 earnings with revenue up 11% YoY and SaaS ARR surging 28.6%, beating analyst estimates. The stock jumped 28% on the news, with multiple analysts raising price targets, though insider selling and a neutral UBS rating temper the outlook.
